heading: CONTRACT REGARDING OPERATION OF DISTRICT CAMPUS
operative_text: A school district campus qualifies for an exemption from intervention as provided by Subsection (f) and qualifies for funding as provided by Section 48.252 if the board of trustees of the district contracts to partner to operate the district campus as provided by this section with: (1) the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school; or (2) on approval by the commissioner, an entity granted a charter by the district under Subchapter C, Chapter 12, that is eligible to be awarded a charter under Section 12.101(a).

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school
an entity granted a charter by the district under Subchapter C, Chapter 12, that is eligible to be awarded a charter under Section 12.101(a)
